body.notes: Participation in IETF meetings constitutes agreement to the Note Well, which permits recording, transcription, and public archival of proceedings. See also BCP 78 (RFC 5378) and BCP 79 (RFC 8179) for IPR policies.

body.title: Considerations for Assigning a New Recommended Differentiated Services Code Point (DSCP)
DCCP Extensions for Multipath Operation with Multiple Addresses
A Non-Queue-Building Per-Hop Behavior (NQB PHB) for Differentiated Services
